scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.audit: npm --prefix backend audit && npm --prefix frontend audit
scripts.audit:check: npm --prefix backend audit --json > /tmp/audit-backend.json; npm --prefix frontend audit --json > /tmp/audit-frontend.json; node scripts/audit-check.mjs --report /tmp/audit-backend.json --label backend --level high && node scripts/audit-check.mjs --report /tmp/audit-frontend.json --label frontend --level high
scripts.audit:fix: npm --prefix backend audit fix && npm --prefix frontend audit fix
scripts.audit:signatures: npm --prefix backend audit signatures && npm --prefix frontend audit signatures
scripts.sbom: npm --prefix backend sbom --sbom-format cyclonedx --output-file sbom-backend.json && npm --prefix frontend sbom --sbom-format cyclonedx --output-file sbom-frontend.json
scripts.security:full: npm run audit:check && npm run audit:signatures && npm run secret:scan
